title: Estuary 2 · the twelve walks
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: Twelve walks logged
entries.blurb: Same mudflat, twelve times, until it wasn't the same mudflat. The journal filled itself the way journals do — one noticed thing at a time.

entries.title: The county votes for the marina
entries.blurb: The channel gets dredged. The flat you walked twelve times becomes moorage. Ruth was at the hearing. You know how you voted.

entries.title: The flat as you knew it
entries.blurb: The marina dies in committee. The flat stays. Ruth no longer waves — some victories cost the neighbors who wanted the jobs.

entries.title: The half-channel
entries.blurb: Half a channel, half a marina, everybody half-satisfied. Estuary 3 inherits this exact status quo, which is why Sam's summer looks the way it looks.

entries.title: Mud Shrimp
entries.blurb: Page one for most players. The flat's whole economy, thumb-sized and burrowing.

entries.title: Staghorn Sculpin
entries.blurb: Ugly on purpose. The journal page is kinder than the fish deserves.

entries.title: Great Blue Heron
entries.blurb: The flat's tallest opinion. Illuminating this page takes standing still longer than feels reasonable.

entries.title: Eelgrass
entries.blurb: Not glamorous. Holds the entire system together. The quietest page in the journal.

entries.title: Chum Fry
entries.blurb: A thousand silver commas heading to sea. You were there on the right tide.

entries.title: Coho Smolt
entries.blurb: The marina hearing is about this page, whether or not anyone says so out loud.

entries.title: Cutthroat
entries.blurb: Sea-run and secretive. The page illuminates only for walkers who check the sloughs.

entries.title: Shore Crab
entries.blurb: Under every third rock. Pinches. The journal's most re-enacted illustration.

entries.title: River Otter
entries.blurb: The flat's only celebrity. You saw it once and thought about it for three walks.

entries.title: Sedge Wren
entries.blurb: Heard on nine walks, seen on one. The page counts the one.

entries.title: Green Sturgeon
entries.blurb: Older than the county. The shadow in the channel that made the dredging vote feel different.

entries.title: Tidewater Goby
entries.blurb: Endangered, inch-long, the reason the paperwork took two extra months. The rarest page.
